title: Delegated Authority Envelope v0.3
$comment: DAE borrows vocabulary from GNAP (RFC 9635) and is architecturally distinct — a portable pre-signed offline-verifiable contract, not a server-connected token. Fields derived from GNAP vocabulary are annotated. AGF-specific extensions are marked with 'agf-extension'.

delegation_id.description: Unique identifier for this delegation. Maps to GNAP access token identifier; expressed as a portable pre-signed identifier rather than a server-issued token.

principal.description: AGF extension (not in GNAP). Identity of the human or system delegating authority. Makes the delegation chain explicit and traceable across trust boundaries.

delegate.description: Identity of the agent receiving delegated authority. Maps to GNAP client identity.

allowed_actions.description: Actions this delegation permits. Maps to GNAP 'access' rights array. Machine-enforceable: if the transaction action is not in this list, the result MUST be deny (ERR_DAE_ACTION_NOT_ALLOWED).

constraints.description: Transaction constraints. All fields are AGF extensions to GNAP.
constraints.$comment: v0.3: added 'currency' (ISO 4217) as required companion to 'max_value'. Without an explicit currency denomination, cross-currency enforcement is undefined.

max_value.description: AGF extension (not in GNAP). Maximum transaction value. Machine-enforceable: if transaction amount exceeds this, the result MUST be deny (ERR_DAE_MAX_VALUE_EXCEEDED). REQUIRED with 'currency' — if max_value is present without currency, result MUST be deny (ERR_DAE_CURRENCY_MISSING).

currency.description: AGF extension. ISO 4217 three-letter currency code (e.g. 'USD', 'EUR', 'GBP'). REQUIRED when max_value is present. Defines the denomination in which max_value is expressed. If present but not a valid ISO 4217 code, result MUST be deny (ERR_DAE_CURRENCY_INVALID).

jurisdiction.description: AGF extension. Jurisdictional constraint on where the delegated action may execute.

expiry.description: Absolute expiry timestamp (RFC3339, UTC). Derived from GNAP token expiry semantics. Expressed as an absolute timestamp (not TTL) for portable offline evaluation. If current time exceeds this value, the result MUST be deny (ERR_DAE_EXPIRED).

revocable.description: Whether this delegation can be revoked before expiry. AGF extension to GNAP inline revocation state.

revoked.description: Current revocation state. AGF extension: carries revocation state inline for enforcement without a server round-trip. If true, the result MUST be deny (ERR_DAE_REVOKED). GNAP uses a server-side revocation API; DAE carries this state portably.

audit_required.description: AGF extension (not in GNAP). If true, the enforcement point MUST emit audit evidence for this delegation evaluation.
